headline: Guy's 'I'm Not Ready For A Relationship' Was Code For 'I'm Not Ready To Stop Seeing Other People'
summary: His roster had 4 people. His excuse had 1. The math wasn't mathing.
fullBody: Tyler Roster told his situationship he 'wasn't ready for a relationship' while actively dating 4 other people. 'It's different,' Tyler explained. 'I'm not ready for labels.' His situationship found the others through a 'are we dating the same guy' Facebook group. The group now has 400 members. Tyler is now 'taking time for himself' — which means 'hiding from 5 angry women.' His DMs are closed. His location is off.
